sentence: They claimed the censorship of the article was an _______ on free speech.
The army timed their _______ to coincide with the local celebrations.
Having washed the plates from dinner, I made an _______ on the laundry.
definition: An attempt to cause damage, injury to, or death of opponent or enemy.
An attempt to detract from the worth or credibility of, a person, position, idea, object, or thing, by physical, verbal, emotional, or other assault.
A time in which one attacks; the offence of a battle.
